info.title: API Order
info.description: Our Orders API allows you to place a purchase order for fulfillment. You can submit an order or fetch details on one single order. ### Submit an order(s): ```js [POST]/v1/orders ``` ### Fetches details for a specific order based on id: ```js [GET]/v1/orders/{id}?orderAcctId={orderAcctId} ``` API Product: Order-Commerce(-UAT/-PROD)

post.description: Creates a single order and returns an order id number if successful.

parameters.name: fei-trans-id
parameters.description: Consumer provided transaction id. If not provided service will generate one in UUID format.

201.description: Successfully submitted an order to Ferguson

get.description: Returns a specific order based on the id number.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number you want returned.

CreditCardType.description: The type of the credit card.

CreditCardExpireDate.description: The expiration date of the credit card.

CreditCardMaskedNumber.description: A masked version of the credit card number.

CardHolderCity.description: City of the cardholder's billing address.

CardHolderState.description: State of the cardholder's billing address.

CardHolderZip.description: The ZIP code of the cardholder's billing address.

isError.title: Error indicator
isError.description: TRUE if the service was able to complete successfully, FALSE otherwise

collectionVersion.description: The version of the collection the service is reading.

message.description: Can contain a single string, array, integer or another JSON object. Intentionally vague as it will sometimes contain the error response from the backend server.

schema.description: Machine readable code that indicates the name of an error
Human readable message associated with fe-resp-code header
Transaction Id (passed in by consumer or generated by the service)
